title: 4 Pack of Rubber Door Stop Wedges

description: Product Description Manufactured from the house of kingfisher, operates over 1,100 stores and growing Omni channel operations across 10 countries in Europe. Following an in-depth review of kingfisher’s businesses alongside in-depth studies of our customers’ home improvement needs, the leadership team announced the 'one' kingfisher plan. This plan will leverage the scale of the business by creating a unified company, where customer needs always come first. Box Contains 1 x Rubber Door Stop Wedges - 4 Pack
